description: code-address (a64) constants: function pointers in closures, higher-order dispatch through function values, deep/mutual recursion (call return addresses), dispatch tables. On wasm32 these emit i64.const CODE_BASE+labelIdx (lea) and return-address constants, now narrowed from 10-byte to 5-byte sleb (all wasm32 addresses < 2^32 fit). Guards that narrowing. Output identical native vs wasm.

expect.stdout:
ops 7 12 6
hof 2,4,6,8,10,12,14,16 2,4,6,8 36
closure 13
recur 6765 125250
parity true false
table 24
